race.comment: Good contest. SHELSTEIN (2) great ride from the wide gate to cruise across and show a ton of cheek with a fighting on-pace second to Azarax over 1300m at Hawkesbury in a solid running contest. Key jockey change from the low draw and no excuses today. BETTER LATE (6) fifth-up for this with a handy winning CV. Three weeks between runs when he chased late to take ground off Sneaky Sofia when third over 1100m at Wyong. Ashley Morgan goes back aboard and will be ridden for luck from the sticky gate. NATION CHANGING (8) talented Tamworth-trained gelding chasing his fourth win from six starts. Proved too slick on resumption when taken to the front to salute over 1200m at Tamworth. Open to further of improvement and can overcome the wide draw. SOLITARIO (5) talented gelding who was a total forgive first-up from the wide gate with a fading twelfth over 1300m at Rosehill in Highway class. Maps well with the blinkers coming off.
